title: Ice Cube Tray with Lid, Soft Silicone Ice Moulds, Diamond Shape Ice Cube for Drinks and Desserts, Easy Removal (Green, 1 Pack)
features: EASY RELEASE - Soft silicone trays are the new kitchen must haves, our TIJAR ice cube tray is made from 100% BPA free high quality materials
STACKABLE - Each tray comes with a lid - will not spill out and can easily stack on top of each other
STYLISH - Nice shape cubes are a great addition to your drinks
MULTI USE- Can be used for ice moulds and fruit moulds
HEAVY DUTY - Our Silicone trays are made from heavy duty silicone making them strong and durable
description: Product Description Is the silicone ice cube tray safe for food and drink use? Yes, the Tijar Silicone Ice Cube Tray is made from high-quality, BPA-free, food-grade silicone. It’s completely safe for making ice cubes, chocolates, baby food, fruit cubes, and more. How easy is it to remove the ice cubes from the tray? The flexible silicone design makes removing ice cubes effortless. Simply twist or press the bottom of each hexagon mould and the cubes pop out smoothly without cracking or breaking. Does it come with a lid and what is the lid used for? Yes, each tray includes a lid. The lid helps prevent spills, keeps the ice cubes fresh, and avoids unwanted freezer odours or contamination. Can I use this tray for more than just ice cubes? Absolutely. The tray is versatile and can be used for freezing herbs, fruit infusions, baby food portions, sauces, coffee cubes, or even for making small desserts and chocolates. What sizes or pack options are available? The Tijar Silicone Ice Cube Tray is available as a single pack or a double pack, both featuring the stylish hexagon design. Each tray makes multiple evenly shaped cubes ideal for cocktails, smoothies, and everyday use.
